industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Ayen Enerji A.S.
summary: Ayen Enerji A.S., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the production, distribution, and trade of electricity in Turkey and internationally. Its electricity generation include 591.944.352 kWh electricity from hydroelectric, and 256.706.740 kWh electricity wind sources. The company was incorporated in 1990 and is based in Ankara, Turkey. Ayen Enerji A.S. is a subsidiary of Aydiner Insaat AS.
